blocks.title: Simple For Loop
Countdown

blocks.content: Notice that this loop counts **backwards** using `count--` (subtract 1 each time).

blocks.title: Multiplication Table

blocks.instruction: Create a loop that counts from 1 to 3:
blocks.explanation: i++ adds 1 to i each time the loop repeats.

questions.question: How many times will this loop run: for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++)?
questions.explanation: The loop runs while i < 5, so i goes from 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 - that's 5 times.
